---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new capability or improvement for SocietyPress
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

<!--
  Please read CONTRIBUTING.md first. Feature requests are welcome but not
  every request will be acted on — the project scope is deliberately bounded.
  A polite "no" is not a judgment on the idea.
-->

## The problem

<!-- Describe the problem you're trying to solve. What is your society doing today that's painful or awkward? -->

## Who would benefit

<!-- Roughly how many societies would use this? Is it niche (one type of society) or broad (every society)? -->

## What you're doing today

<!-- How do you handle this now in the absence of the feature? Manual workaround? External tool? -->

## Possible approaches

<!-- Optional. If you have ideas about how it might work, share them — but don't feel you need to solve it. Describing the problem well is more useful than proposing a specific solution. -->

## References

<!-- Optional. If other platforms handle this well (or poorly), link to examples. -->
